Mountain Rises.ceremony: Stone roots run through your meridians — the mountain's unyielding dao is yours to carry.
Mountain Rises.stat_note: Foundation hardened: +breakthrough stability from your origin.

Waterside Vow.ceremony: River mist clings to your skin; qi flows easier, as if water remembers your vow.
Waterside Vow.stat_note: Flowing dao: +5% cultivate qi from your origin.

Ancient Tomb Awakened.ceremony: Dust of forgotten dynasties swirls — a sliver of forbidden soul art awakens in your grasp.
Ancient Tomb Awakened.stat_note: Tomb-touched fate: +rare event chance from your origin.

River Dragon\u2019s Gift.ceremony: A scale of fortune glints in your palm — the river dragon's blessing follows you.
River Dragon\u2019s Gift.stat_note: Dragon's favor: +drop luck from your origin.

Starfall Seclusion.ceremony: Starlight still lingers in your eyes from nights spent cultivating beneath falling heavens.
Starfall Seclusion.stat_note: Star-touched qi: +8% cultivate qi and longer offline gains.

Wandering Immortal\u2019s Footsteps.ceremony: Footprints of a long-dead immortal fade behind you — a sword manual appears as if left on purpose.
Wandering Immortal\u2019s Footsteps.stat_note: Wanderer's eye: +adventure success from your origin.
